description:
An advanced-concepts engineer must size a rigid airship envelope to meet a strict volumetric requirement for aerostatic lift. The target displaced volume is 75,000 m^3, with a strict Fineness Ratio (Length / Max Diameter) of 5.0.

1. Open OpenVSP and create a streamlined axisymmetric Fuselage component (the envelope).
2. Iteratively scale its Length and Max Diameter (keeping Fineness Ratio at exactly 5.0) until the volume is approximately 75,000 m^3. (Hint: Length should be roughly 150-160m, Diameter 30-32m).
3. Add an empennage by attaching at least 3 tail fins (Wing components) to the aft 20% of the envelope.
4. Save your completed model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/haps_airship.vsp3
5. Write a summary report to /home/ga/Desktop/airship_report.txt containing the final Envelope Length, Max Diameter, and Measured Volume in metric units.
